# Standard Penetration Test

> Standard Penetration Test (SPT) across the UK: reliable soil investigation for foundation design, ground improvement, and geotechnical assessments.

Geotechnical engineering — standardpenetrationtest.net.

## Pages

- [Resources](https://standardpenetrationtest.net/blog/water-levels/)

- [DPSH Dynamic Probing](https://standardpenetrationtest.net/dpsh-dynamic-probing/)
- [DPL Light Dynamic Probing](https://standardpenetrationtest.net/dpl-light-dynamic-probing/)
